strengths: 15+ years of hands-on software engineering across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains, with direct experience in AI-agent infrastructure and ML-driven tooling at re:cinq.
Proven track record of building and open-sourcing production-grade AI/geo-data platforms (GISCollective) used by real-world organizations, demonstrating product fluency and end-to-end ownership.
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, code kata, and CI/CD infrastructure setup — aligning with the role’s need to inspire teams and share insights on disruptive AI initiatives.
concerns: No explicit mention of a Master’s or PhD in AI, though practical experience may compensate per job description’s 'equivalent practical experience' clause.
Limited public evidence of direct cloud platform design (e.g., AWS/GCP/Azure product strategy) beyond using AWS CDK — may require deeper validation of strategic cloud AI architecture skills.
German language proficiency is listed as 'basic,' which could pose minor operational challenges in a Berlin-based role requiring frequent stakeholder alignment.
response.justification: Bogdan’s 15+ years of full-stack engineering, direct work on AI-agent infrastructure, and proven delivery of real-world AI/geo-data platforms like GISCollective — combined with his consistent leadership in teaching, tooling, and CI/CD — make him a compelling fit for a director-level IC role focused on AI strategy and technical inspiration, even without a formal advanced degree.
